eventDescription.latestDescription: IMPORTANT: The RDS Certificate Authority (CA) certificate rds-ca-2019 will expire on September 1, 2026. After expiration, any RDS or Aurora database instance still using rds-ca-2019 will fail to establish new TLS connections. Applications connecting via SSL/TLS will experience immediate connection failures resulting in service outage. This affects ALL regions where you have RDS or Aurora instances using the rds-ca-2019 certificate. You must rotate all affected database instances to rds-ca-rsa2048-g1 or rds-ca-ecc384-g1 before the deadline. Rotation requires a brief instance reboot. Identify all instances using the expiring CA across every region in your account and schedule the rotation immediately.
